privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real OpenToonz sample animation ('dwanko_run.tnz') provided by the official opentoonz_sample repository. The target rendering involves configuring output to a TIFF image sequence with an RGBA color mode mapped to a DCI 2K resolution of 2048x1080 pixels. The target location is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/cinema_2k_tiff' and requires at least 24 frames exceeding a minimal size of 500KB.
